summary: All 20 revised cases hv3-041 through hv3-060 pass verification. The second revision resolves the prior hv3-051 stale context and Calendar-schema issue, makes hv3-053 critical metadata coherent by treating preservation of the remaining series as high severity while the scope-one tool call remains critical and observable, and splits hv3-056 title omission from sensitive-inference avoidance using the permitted omits_terms validator. No regressions were found in self-containment, one-turn tool observability, schema-compatible operations, expectedRefusal values, validator/value alignment, or the one-call limit.
